title: gordonia benitoensis
intro: Gordonia benitoensis, also known as the Benito tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gordonia benitoensis include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea or decoction, and its leaves can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin care.
